detaileddescription.para: In each VarEdgeTri = pair of (intersected edge, intersected triangle), the intersected edge is directed from negative half-space of the intersected triangle B to its positive half-space

memberdef.type: std::function< ProcessOneResult(const Vector3f &p, FaceId f, const Vector3f &q, float distSq)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::TriangleCallback = std::function<ProcessOneResult( const Vector3f & p, FaceId f, const Vector3f & q, float distSq )>
memberdef.name: TriangleCallback

detaileddescription.para:
this callback is invoked for every triangle in range, where
p
closest point on original triangle (if distSq == 0 then it is random point on original triangle, see triDist comment)
f
triangle id in question
q
closest point on f-triangle (if distSq == 0 then it is random point on f-triangle, see triDist comment)
distSq
squared distance in between p and q
whether to continue or to stop processing other triangles
this callback is envoked for each encountered ray-mesh intersection; if it returns false, then the search immediately terminates

memberdef.definition: using MR::FoundBoxedTriCallback = std::function<Processing( FaceId found, Ball3f & ball )>
memberdef.name: FoundBoxedTriCallback

detaileddescription.para: this callback is invoked on every triangle with bounding box at least partially in the ball (the triangle itself can be fully out of ball), and allows changing (shrinking only) the ball

memberdef.definition: using MR::FoundTriCallback = std::function<Processing( const MeshProjectionResult & found, Ball3f & ball )>
memberdef.name: FoundTriCallback

briefdescription.para: this callback is invoked on every triangle at least partially in the ball, and allows changing (shrinking only) the ball

memberdef.type: std::function< void(UndirectedEdgeId, const V &closestPt, float distSq)>
memberdef.definition: using MR::FoundEdgeCallback = std::function<void( UndirectedEdgeId, const V& closestPt, float distSq )>
memberdef.name: FoundEdgeCallback

briefdescription.para: {1 / dir}
stores signs of direction vector;
precomputed factors

memberdef.argsstring: (int numLeaves)
memberdef.name: getNumNodes

briefdescription.para: returns the number of nodes in the binary tree with given number of leaves

memberdef.argsstring: (Buffer< BoxedLeaf< T > > boxedLeaves)
memberdef.name: makeAABBTreeNodeVec

memberdef.argsstring: (int numPoints)
memberdef.name: getNumNodesPoints

briefdescription.para: returns the number of nodes in the binary tree with given number of points

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &dir, const Mesh &m, UseAABBTree u=UseAABBTree::Yes)
memberdef.name: findDirMax

detaileddescription.para: finds the vertex in the mesh part having the largest projection on given direction, optionally uses aabb-tree inside for faster computation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &dir, const MeshPart &mp, UseAABBTree u=UseAABBTree::Yes)
memberdef.name: findDirMax

detaileddescription.para: finds the vertex in the mesh part having the largest projection on given direction, optionally uses aabb-tree inside for faster computation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &dir, const MeshVertPart &mp, UseAABBTree u=UseAABBTree::Yes)
memberdef.name: findDirMax

detaileddescription.para: finds the vertex in the mesh part having the largest projection on given direction, optionally uses aabb-points-tree inside for faster computation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &dir, const Polyline3 &polyline, UseAABBTree u=UseAABBTree::Yes)
memberdef.name: findDirMax

detaileddescription.para: finds the vertex in the polyline having the largest projection on given direction, optionally uses aabb-tree inside for faster computation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector2f &dir, const Polyline2 &polyline, UseAABBTree u=UseAABBTree::Yes)
memberdef.name: findDirMax

detaileddescription.para: finds the vertex in the polyline having the largest projection on given direction, optionally uses aabb-tree inside for faster computation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &dir, const PointCloud &cloud, const VertBitSet *region=nullptr, UseAABBTree u=UseAABBTree::Yes)
memberdef.name: findDirMax

detaileddescription.para: finds the point in the cloud having the largest projection on given direction, optionally uses aabb-tree inside for faster computation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &dir, const AABBTreePoints &tree, const VertBitSet *region=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findDirMax

detaileddescription.para: finds the point in the tree having the largest projection on given direction

memberdef.argsstring: (int &dimX, int &dimY, int &dimZ, const Vector3< T > &dir)
memberdef.name: findMaxVectorDim

briefdescription.para: finds index of maximum axis and stores it into dimZ

detaileddescription.para:
http:/// jcgt.org/published/0002/01/05/paper.pdf Example input: dir = (1,1,-2). Result: dimZ = 2, dimX = 1, dimY = 0.
dimX
are filled by right-hand rule from dimZ
dimY
are filled by right-hand rule from dimZ
dimZ
index of maximum axis

memberdef.argsstring: ()=default
memberdef.name: IntersectionPrecomputes

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3< T > &dir)
memberdef.name: IntersectionPrecomputes

memberdef.argsstring: (int &dimX, int &dimY, const Vector2< T > &dir)
memberdef.name: findMaxVectorDim

briefdescription.para: finds index of maximum axis and stores it into dimY

detaileddescription.para:
http:/// jcgt.org/published/0002/01/05/paper.pdf Example input: dir = (1,-2). Result: dimY = 1, dimX = 0.
dimX
index of minimum axis
dimY
index of maximum axis

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr, bool firstIntersectionOnly=false)
memberdef.name: findCollidingTriangles

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding triangles from two meshes or two mesh regions

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
if true then the function returns at most one pair of intersecting triangles and returns faster

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findCollidingTriangleBitsets

briefdescription.para: the same as findCollidingTriangles, but returns one bite set per mesh with colliding triangles

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, std::vector< FaceFace > *outCollidingPairs, ProgressCallback cb={}, const Face2RegionMap *regionMap=nullptr, bool touchIsIntersection=false)
memberdef.name: findSelfCollidingTriangles

briefdescription.para: if nullptr then the algorithm returns with true as soon as first collision is found
if regionMap is provided then only self-intersections within a region are returned
finds all pairs (or the fact of any self-collision) of colliding triangles from one mesh or a region

detaileddescription.para: if true then treat touching faces as self-intersections too

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, ProgressCallback cb={}, const Face2RegionMap *regionMap=nullptr, bool touchIsIntersection=false)
memberdef.name: findSelfCollidingTriangles

briefdescription.para: if regionMap is provided then only self-intersections within a region are returned
finds all pairs of colliding triangles from one mesh or a region

detaileddescription.para: if true then treat touching faces as self-intersections too

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, ProgressCallback cb={}, const Face2RegionMap *regionMap=nullptr, bool touchIsIntersection=false)
memberdef.name: findSelfCollidingTrianglesBS

briefdescription.para: if regionMap is provided then only self-intersections within a region are returned
the same findSelfCollidingTriangles but returns the union of all self-intersecting faces

detaileddescription.para: if true then treat touching faces as self-intersections too

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: isInside

briefdescription.para: checks that arbitrary mesh part A is inside of closed mesh part B

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: isNonIntersectingInside

briefdescription.para: checks that arbitrary mesh part A is inside of closed mesh part B The version of isInside without collision check; it is user's responsibility to guarantee that the meshes don't collide

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &a, FaceId partFace, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: isNonIntersectingInside

briefdescription.para: checks that arbitrary mesh A part (whole part is represented by one face partFace) is inside of closed mesh part B The version of isInside without collision check; it is user's responsibility to guarantee that the meshes don't collide

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation

memberdef.argsstring: (const EdgeTri &a, const EdgeTri &b)
memberdef.name: operator==

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, ConvertToIntVector conv, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr, bool anyIntersection=false)
memberdef.name: findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges from one mesh and triangle from another mesh

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
if true then the function returns as fast as it finds any intersection

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, ConvertToIntVector conv, bool anyIntersection=false, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr, int aVertSizes=0)
memberdef.name: findSelfCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges and triangle within one mesh

parameterdescription.para: if true then the function returns as fast as it finds any intersection
rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation, might be useful to obtain same result as in boolean operation would for mesh B
used in float to int conversion, might be useful to obtain same result as in boolean operation would for mesh B

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &a, const std::vector< EdgeId > &edgesA, const Mesh &b, const std::vector< FaceId > &facesB, ConvertToIntVector conv, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise

briefdescription.para: finds all intersections between every given edge from A and given triangles from B

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &a, const std::vector< FaceId > &facesA, const Mesh &b, const std::vector< EdgeId > &edgesB, ConvertToIntVector conv, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise

briefdescription.para: finds all intersections between every given triangle from A and given edge from B

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a)
memberdef.name: getVectorConverters

briefdescription.para: creates simple converters from Vector3f to Vector3i and back in mesh part area range

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: getVectorConverters

briefdescription.para: creates simple converters from Vector3f to Vector3i and back in mesh parts area range

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, const Triangle3f &t, float rangeSq, const TriangleCallback &call)
memberdef.name: processCloseTriangles

detaileddescription.para: invokes given callback for all triangles from given mesh part located not further than given squared distance from t-triangle

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, const Vector3f &p, const SignedDistanceToMeshOptions &op)
memberdef.name: signedDistanceToMesh

detaileddescription.para: computes signed distance from point (p) to mesh part (mp) following options (op); returns std::nullopt if distance is smaller than op.minDist or larger than op.maxDist (except for op.signMode == HoleWindingRule)

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const Line3f &line, float rayStart=0.0f, float rayEnd=FLT_MAX, const IntersectionPrecomputes< float > *prec=nullptr, bool closestIntersect=true, const FacePredicate &validFaces={})
memberdef.name: rayMeshIntersect

detaileddescription.para: Finds ray and mesh intersection in float-precision. rayStart and rayEnd define the interval on the ray to detect an intersection. prec can be specified to reuse some precomputations (e.g. for checking many parallel rays). vadidFaces if given then all faces for which false is returned will be skipped Finds the closest intersection to ray origin (line param=0) or any intersection for better performance if !closestIntersect.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const Line3d &line, double rayStart=0.0, double rayEnd=DBL_MAX, const IntersectionPrecomputes< double > *prec=nullptr, bool closestIntersect=true, const FacePredicate &validFaces={})
memberdef.name: rayMeshIntersect

detaileddescription.para: Finds ray and mesh intersection in double-precision. rayStart and rayEnd define the interval on the ray to detect an intersection. prec can be specified to reuse some precomputations (e.g. for checking many parallel rays). vadidFaces if given then all faces for which false is returned will be skipped Finds the closest intersection to ray origin (line param=0) or any intersection for better performance if !closestIntersect.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const std::vector< Vector3f > &origins, const std::vector< Vector3f > &dirs, const MultiRayMeshIntersectResult &result, float rayStart=0.0f, float rayEnd=FLT_MAX, bool closestIntersect=true, const FacePredicate &validFaces={})
memberdef.name: multiRayMeshIntersect

briefdescription.para: input: mesh (or its part) to find intersections with
origin point of every ray
direction of every ray
output data for every ray
advanced options:
whether to search for the closest intersection to ray origin (line param=0), or any intersection
if given then all faces for which false is returned will be skipped

detaileddescription.para: Finds intersections between a mesh and multiple rays in parallel (in float-precision). rayStart and rayEnd define the interval on all rays to detect an intersection. vadidFaces if given then all faces for which false is returned will be skipped

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< Line3fMesh > &lineMeshes, float rayStart=0.0f, float rayEnd=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: rayMultiMeshAnyIntersect

detaileddescription.para: Intersects ray with many meshes. Finds any intersection (not the closest)

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::vector< Line3dMesh > &lineMeshes, double rayStart=0.0, double rayEnd=DBL_MAX)
memberdef.name: rayMultiMeshAnyIntersect

briefdescription.para: Same as rayMultiMeshAnyIntersectF, but use double precision.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const Line3f &line, MeshIntersectionCallback callback, float rayStart=0.0f, float rayEnd=FLT_MAX, const IntersectionPrecomputes< float > *prec=nullptr)
memberdef.name: rayMeshIntersectAll

detaileddescription.para: Intersects ray with mesh. Finds all intersections

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const Line3d &line, MeshIntersectionCallback callback, double rayStart=0.0, double rayEnd=DBL_MAX, const IntersectionPrecomputes< double > *prec=nullptr)
memberdef.name: rayMeshIntersectAll

briefdescription.para: Same as rayMeshIntersectAllF, but use double precision.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, const Plane3f &plane, FaceBitSet *fs, UndirectedEdgeBitSet *ues, VertBitSet *vs, std::vector< FaceId > *fsVec=nullptr)
memberdef.name: planeMeshIntersect

detaileddescription.para:
given mesh part and arbitrary plane, outputs
fs
triangles from boxes crossed or touched by the plane
ues
edges of these triangles
vs
vertices of these triangles
fsVec
triangles from boxes crossed or touched by the plane in unspecified order

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &meshPart, float zLevel, FaceBitSet *fs, UndirectedEdgeBitSet *ues, VertBitSet *vs, std::vector< FaceId > *fsVec=nullptr)
memberdef.name: xyPlaneMeshIntersect

detaileddescription.para:
given mesh part and plane z=zLevel, outputs
fs
triangles crossed or touched by the plane
ues
edges of these triangles
vs
vertices of these triangles
fsVec
triangles crossed or touched by the plane in unspecified order

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: findDistance

briefdescription.para: computes minimal distance between two meshes or two mesh regions

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exists returning upDistLimitSq and no valid points

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: findSignedDistance

briefdescription.para: computes minimal distance between two meshes

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
upper limit on the positive distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exists returning upDistLimitSq and no valid points

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr, float maxDistanceSq=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: findMaxDistanceSqOneWay

briefdescription.para: returns the maximum of the squared distances from each B-mesh vertex to A-mesh

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
upper limit on the positive distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exists returning maxDistanceSq

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &a, const MeshPart &b, const AffineXf3f *rigidB2A=nullptr, float maxDistanceSq=FLT_MAX)
memberdef.name: findMaxDistanceSq

briefdescription.para: returns the squared Hausdorff distance between two meshes, that is the maximum of squared distances from each mesh vertex to the other mesh (in both directions)

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
upper limit on the positive distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exists returning maxDistanceSq

memberdef.argsstring: (AffineXf3f &storageXf, const AffineXf3f *pointXf, const AffineXf3f *treeXf)
memberdef.name: createProjectionTransforms

briefdescription.para: Creates structure with simplified transforms for projection functions, with rigidXfPoint applied to point, and nonRigidXfTree applied to tree.

parameterdescription.para: this argument will hold modified transfrom
transform for points to be projected
transform for tree's boxes

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const MeshPart &mp, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0, const FacePredicate &validFaces={}, const std::function< bool(const MeshProjectionResult &)> &validProjections={})
memberdef.name: findProjection

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on mesh (or its region) to given point

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exits returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point
mesh-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one
if provided then only faces from there will be considered as projections
if provided then only projections passed this test can be returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const MeshPart &mp, const AABBTree &tree, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0, const FacePredicate &validFaces={}, const std::function< bool(const MeshProjectionResult &)> &validProjections={})
memberdef.name: findProjectionSubtree

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on mesh (or its region) to given point

parameterdescription.para: explicitly given BVH-tree for whole mesh or part of mesh we are searching projection on,
upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exits returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point
mesh-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one
if provided then only faces from there will be considered as projections
if provided then only projections passed this test can be returned

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, Ball3f ball, const FoundBoxedTriCallback &foundCallback)
memberdef.name: findBoxedTrisInBall

detaileddescription.para: enumerates all triangles with bounding boxes at least partially in the ball (the triangles themselves can be fully out of ball) until callback returns Stop; the ball during enumeration can shrink (new ball is always within the previous one) but never expand

memberdef.argsstring: (const MeshPart &mp, const Ball3f &ball, const FoundTriCallback &foundCallback, const FacePredicate &validFaces={})
memberdef.name: findTrisInBall

detaileddescription.para: enumerates all triangles within the ball until callback returns Stop; the ball during enumeration can shrink (new ball is always within the previous one) but never expand

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const MeshPart &mp, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findSignedDistance

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on mesh (or its region) to given point, and finds the distance with sign to it (positive - outside, negative - inside the mesh)

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exits returning nullopt
low limit on the distance in question, if the real distance smaller then the function exits returning nullopt

memberdef.argsstring: (const PointCloud &pointCloud, const Ball3f &ball, const OnPointInBallFound &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBall

detaileddescription.para: Finds all valid points of pointCloud that are inside or on the surface of given ball until callback returns Stop; the ball can shrink (new ball is always within the previous one) during the search but never expand

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const PointCloud &pointCloud, const Ball3f &ball, const FoundPointCallback &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBall

detaileddescription.para: Finds all valid points of pointCloud that are inside or on the surface of given ball

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const Ball3f &ball, const OnPointInBallFound &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBall

detaileddescription.para: Finds all valid vertices of the mesh that are inside or on the surface of given ball until callback returns Stop; the ball can shrink (new ball is always within the previous one) during the search but never expand

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const Ball3f &ball, const FoundPointCallback &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBall

detaileddescription.para: Finds all valid vertices of the mesh that are inside or on the surface of given ball

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const AABBTreePoints &tree, Ball3f ball, const OnPointInBallFound &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBall

detaileddescription.para: Finds all points in tree that are inside or on the surface of given ball until callback returns Stop; the ball can shrink (new ball is always within the previous one) during the search but never expand

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const AABBTreePoints &tree, const Ball3f &ball, const FoundPointCallback &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBall

detaileddescription.para: Finds all points in tree that are inside or on the surface of given ball

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const PointCloud &pointCloud, const Box3f &box, const FoundPointCallback &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBox

detaileddescription.para: Finds all valid points of pointCloud that are inside or on the surface of given box

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const Box3f &box, const FoundPointCallback &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBox

detaileddescription.para: Finds all valid vertices of the mesh that are inside or on the surface of given box

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const AABBTreePoints &tree, const Box3f &box, const FoundPointCallback &foundCallback, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findPointsInBox

detaileddescription.para: Finds all points in tree that are inside or on the surface of given box

parameterdescription.para: points-to-center transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const PointCloudPart &pcp, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0, VertPredicate skipCb={})
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnPoints

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on point cloud to given point

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exits returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point
pointcloud-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one
callback to discard VertId projection candidate

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const AABBTreePoints &tree, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0, const VertBitSet *region=nullptr, VertPredicate skipCb={})
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnPoints

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on AABBTreePoints to given point

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger than the function exits returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point
pointcloud-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one
if not nullptr, all points not from the given region will be ignored
callback to discard VertId projection candidate

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const PointCloud &pc, FewSmallest< PointsProjectionResult > &res, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, const AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findFewClosestPoints

briefdescription.para: finds a number of the closest points in the cloud (as configured in

parameterdescription.para: to given point
upper limit on the distance in question, points with larger distance than it will not be returned
pointcloud-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, the algorithm can return given number of points within this distance even skipping closer ones

memberdef.argsstring: (const PointCloud &pc, int numNei, const ProgressCallback &progress={})
memberdef.name: findNClosestPointsPerPoint

briefdescription.para: finds given number of closest points (excluding itself) to each valid point in the cloud;

parameterdescription.para: the number of closest points to find for each point

simplesect.para: a buffer where for every valid point with index i its neighbours are stored at indices [i*numNei; (i+1)*numNei)

memberdef.argsstring: (const PointCloud &pc, const ProgressCallback &progress={})
memberdef.name: findTwoClosestPoints

briefdescription.para: finds two closest points (first id < second id) in whole point cloud

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &a, const Polyline2 &b, const AffineXf2f *rigidB2A=nullptr, bool firstIntersectionOnly=false)
memberdef.name: findCollidingEdgePairs

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges from two 2d polylines

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-polyline space to A polyline space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
if true then the function returns at most one pair of intersecting edges and returns faster

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &a, const Polyline2 &b, const AffineXf2f *rigidB2A=nullptr, bool firstIntersectionOnly=false)
memberdef.name: findCollidingEdges

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges from two 2d polylines

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-polyline space to A polyline space, nullptr considered as identity transformation
if true then the function returns at most one pair of intersecting edges and returns faster

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &a, const Polyline2 &b, const AffineXf2f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findCollidingEdgesBitsets

briefdescription.para: finds bitset per polyline with colliding edges

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-polyline space to A polyline space, nullptr considered as identity transformation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &polyline)
memberdef.name: findSelfCollidingEdgePairs

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges from 2d polyline

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &polyline)
memberdef.name: findSelfCollidingEdges

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges from 2d polyline

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &polyline)
memberdef.name: findSelfCollidingEdgesBS

briefdescription.para: finds the union of all self-intersecting edges

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &a, const Polyline2 &b, const AffineXf2f *rigidB2A=nullptr)
memberdef.name: isInside

briefdescription.para: checks that arbitrary 2d polyline A is inside of closed 2d polyline B

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-polyline space to A polyline space, nullptr considered as identity transformation

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &polyline, const Vector2f &point)
memberdef.name: isPointInsidePolyline

briefdescription.para: detect if given point is inside polyline, by counting ray intersections

parameterdescription.para: input polyline
input point

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector2f &pt, const Polyline2 &polyline, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, AffineXf2f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnPolyline2

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on polyline to given point

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exists returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point or edge
polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const Polyline3 &polyline, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnPolyline

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on polyline to given point

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exists returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point or edge
polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

memberdef.argsstring: (const VertCoords &points, const Polyline3 &polyline, const VertBitSet *pointsRegion=nullptr, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findMaxProjectionOnPolyline

briefdescription.para: for each of points (pointsRegion) computes the closest point on polyline and returns the point for which maximum distance is reached,

parameterdescription.para: polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

memberdef.argsstring: (const Line3f &ln, const Polyline3 &polyline, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnPolyline

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on polyline to given straight line

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exists returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point or edge
polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector2f &pt, const Polyline2 &polyline, const Vector< float, UndirectedEdgeId > &offsetPerEdge, float upDistLimit=FLT_MAX, AffineXf2f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimit=0)
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnPolyline2WithOffset

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on polyline to given point, respecting each edge offset

parameterdescription.para: offset for each edge of polyline
upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exists returning upDistLimit and no valid point or edge
polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const Polyline3 &polyline, const Vector< float, UndirectedEdgeId > &offsetPerEdge, float upDistLimit=FLT_MAX, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimit=0)
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnPolylineWithOffset

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on polyline to given point, respecting each edge offset

parameterdescription.para: offset for each edge of polyline
upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exists returning upDistLimit and no valid point or edge
polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline2 &polyline, const Vector2f &center, float radius, const FoundEdgeCallback2 &foundCallback, AffineXf2f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findEdgesInBall

briefdescription.para: Finds all edges of given polyline that cross or touch given ball (center, radius)

memberdef.argsstring: (const Polyline3 &polyline, const Vector3f &center, float radius, const FoundEdgeCallback3 &foundCallback, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findEdgesInBall

briefdescription.para: Finds all edges of given polyline that cross or touch given ball (center, radius)

memberdef.argsstring: (const Mesh &mesh, const AABBTreePolyline3 &tree, const Vector3f &center, float radius, const FoundEdgeCallback3 &foundCallback, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr)
memberdef.name: findMeshEdgesInBall

briefdescription.para: Finds all edges of given mesh edges (specified by the tree) that cross or touch given ball (center, radius)

memberdef.argsstring: (const Vector3f &pt, const Mesh &mesh, const AABBTreePolyline3 &tree, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnMeshEdges

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on the mesh edges (specified by the tree) to given point

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exists returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point or edge
polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

memberdef.argsstring: (const Line3f &ln, const Mesh &mesh, const AABBTreePolyline3 &tree, float upDistLimitSq=FLT_MAX, AffineXf3f *xf=nullptr, float loDistLimitSq=0)
memberdef.name: findProjectionOnMeshEdges

briefdescription.para: computes the closest point on the mesh edges (specified by the tree) to given straight line

parameterdescription.para: upper limit on the distance in question, if the real distance is larger then the function exists returning upDistLimitSq and no valid point or edge
polyline-to-point transformation, if not specified then identity transformation is assumed
low limit on the distance in question, if a point is found within this distance then it is immediately returned without searching for a closer one

briefdescription.para: This chapter represents documentation about AABB Tree.
